title: Minor tweaks and additions to the updates feature

posts.author: Kim3 (Kim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I think a feature of customized selectable pre-set updates would be amazing for my team.
Ex: I have a part of my team that strictly faxes / emails referrals and or marketing content out and sometimes their update is simply “Faxed” or “Emailed” because Monday.com already so perfectly time and date stamps the updates!

If there was a way we could edit some pre-set updates maybe per user or per account entirely that would be pretty cool and add to that one click and done flow we have with our Monday set up. Where we can click into the update, click what we want it to say, and be onto the next task!

What are you trying to achieve

With my suggested additions, I’m trying to achieve a quicker turn around in the updates feature. I work fast - sometimes my brain goes faster than my fingers can type.
There are a lot of AMAZING features on Monday.com that give that sense of one click and done. I think there are ways we can add that into the update feature. It’s a big part of my company. We document / take notes on everything. We even enforce what we call an “update minimum” where members of our team have to meet a quota and perform a certain amount of updates per week on their files.
